# On the Basis of Morality

*[Schopenhauer](../philosophers/schopenhauer.md) · 1840 · *Über die Grundlage der Moral**

The second of the two ethical essays, in which Schopenhauer demolishes the Kantian grounding of duty and establishes that compassion, an immediate participation in another's suffering, is the sole authentically moral motive.
